catalog_content:
Item Name: Uncle Lee's Tea Body Slim Dieter Tea, Caffeine Free Chinese Herbal Tea with Senna Leaves and Natural Lemon Flavor, Keep Your Diet on Track for a Healthy Weight, 30 Tea Bags Per Box Bullet Point 1: CAFFEINE FREE WITH NATURAL LEMON FLAVOR: This herbal tea is made with premium natural herbs, including Chinese mallow, lemon zest, and Senna leaf. Bullet Point 2: NATURAL HERBAL TEA: Our diet tea is formulated and prepared based on a Chinese medicine guide with natural herbs and spices. Bullet Point 3: EASY HERBAL TEA: We suggest drinking small amounts of tea, then increasing over time. Pour 2 cups of boiling water over 1 tea bag and allow to steep covered for 2-3 minutes. Drink hot or cold.  Bullet Point 4: NATURAL LAXATIVE SENNA: Our tea contains senna leaf, a natural laxative. We recommend trying this tea at bedtime.   Bullet Point 5: REPUTABLE BRAND: Uncle Lee’s Tea has been producing high-quality tea for over 30 years in the US. We utilize our extensive knowledge and experience to support your lifestyle.  Product Description:

Want to feel lighter and healthier overall?

We all know it’s important to eat a healthy and balanced diet, drink enough water, and exercise regularly. But it doesn’t always happen. Even when we do keep to a healthy diet, our bodies might need that extra push to drop the pounds or to fulfill necessary functions.

Choosing a reputable brand ensures your tea is pure and potent so that your body can use it efficiently. Uncle Lee’s Dieters Tea for Weight Loss is an age-old natural Chinese remedy. It has proven to cleanse the GI tract and help drop those extra pounds.

Uncle Lee’s sets the bar for a superior quality detox tea.

  • Family owned and operated by 5 generations of tea growers.
  • A subsidiary of Ten Fu who has over 1500 tea stores worldwide.
  • 30 years of high-quality products in the US.
  • Formulated and prepared based on age-old Chinese medicine.

100% natural and caffeine-free, this green fresh herbal dieter’s tea can boost your metabolism, work as a gentle laxative, and curb your appetite.

Include this Chinese diet tea in your daily routine and your stomach might just feel flattered.

  • Neutral taste: Drink the deep green flavor as is or sweeten with honey/flavor with lemon.
  • Hot or cold: Enjoy fresh hot tea or healthy iced tea for the same results.
  • Simple to prepare: Steep the tea bag for 2-3 minutes in boiling water. Allow it to cool slightly (or refrigerate for later) and drink.

What you get:

  • 1 box x 30 bags each

More about this Chinese slim tea:

Start slowly, using just one green tea bag seeped for 2-3 minutes to see how your body will react. It is recommended to drink in the evening and test it when you’ll be home for an extended time.

Start feeling better today with Uncle Lee's dieters’ tea for weight loss.

Value: 30.0 Unit: Count
overall_summary: Positioned as a functional herbal tea for weight management, this product leverages a natural, caffeine-free formula with senna leaf and lemon flavor to appeal to health-conscious consumers. The 30-tea-bag count and family-owned brand heritage suggest mid-market positioning with a focus on authenticity and tradition. While lacking premium branding cues, the organic and natural claims provide a slight quality uplift over generic diet teas, potentially justifying a moderate price point.
